body:
Hey Amara, hope the week is treating you well — wanted to reach out because I think there's a real opportunity for [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) and [Beacon](beacon-vc) to co-invest on a deal I've been tracking in the grid-edge software space. The founders are former NREL researchers, deep technical chops, and they're raising a $4M seed round with a lead already soft-committed but looking for a strong co-investor with climate conviction. I know your portfolio skews toward infrastructure plays at the intersection of AI and energy, so this felt like an obvious call to make. Would love to get on a call this week or next to walk you through the deck and the diligence I've done so far. Let me know what your calendar looks like — happy to work around yours.

— Kofi
